- amount USD 6,040

- vendor Finch Demo Support

- release record REL15-009
- tax review TR15-009
- amount USD 6,040

- tax review TR15-009
- amount USD 6,040

B15-09-SRC-05: Policy POL15-009 requires exact match across invoice, vendor, hold id, release record, tax review, and amount; nearby records do not substitute.

Let me verify the exact match:
- Invoice: INV15-009 (matches across all sources)
- Vendor: Finch Demo Support (matches across all sources)


- Hold ID: H15-009 (matches across all sources)
- Release Record: REL15-009 (matches across all sources)
- Tax Review: TR15-009 (matches across all sources)
- Amount: USD 6,040 (matches across all sources)
- Request: ACT15-009 (matches across all sources)

All six data points align perfectly across the scoped authority, review note, binding ledger, and policy requirements. No mismatches exist. The binding ledger explicitly confirms no remaining discrepancies. All required source-control dependencies are present, current, and properly matched to the requested action. The action boundary is closed.

ALLOW.
